case_title: LEE, DONALD D. AS TRUSTEE OF THE YOUNG OY BO LEE vs. RICE, CLAIRE et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DONALD D. AS TRUSTEE OF THE YOUNG OY BO LEE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT RICE, CLAIRE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DONALD D. AS TRUSTEE OF THE YOUNG OY BO LEE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT#8, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. RPT - GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK C/C FOR J. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MARC SEIDENFELD AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT TO ENTER FOR PL. & AGAINST DEF. UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1456 SACRAMENTO ST, #1, S.F, CA. - $4,986 RENT & DAMAGES - $1,299.60 ATTY FEES - $462.90 COSTS - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 11-30-96 - MONEY OWED DUE 11-30-96, BUT NOV RENT DUE BY 11-4-96 - IF DEF. PAYS ALL MONEY DUE ON TIME, PL. WILL MOVE TO S/A JUDGMENT & DISM ACTION - DEF. STIPS. TO BEING THE ONLY PERSON IN POSSESSION OF PREMISES - SUP.CT. CASE 	80065 TO BE DISM. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DONALD D. AS TRUSTEE OF THE YOUNG OY BO LEE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RICE, CLAIRE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT RICE, CLAIRE JURY TRIAL SET FOR SEP-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR HANSEN, CLIFFORD A AS ATTORNEY FOR RICE, CLAIRE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICE, CLAIRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1456 SACRAMENTO ST, #1, S.F, CA. $4,986.00 RENT, $1,325.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $437.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,748.50, STAYED UNTIL NOV-30-1996, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY & SHERIFF MAY POST. IF ALL SUMS PD BY 11-30-96 & NOV RENT PD 11-4-96, PL WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DI SM. DEF. WRNTS SHE IS ONLY OCCUPANT. NO FURTHE STAYS. DEF TO DISM SC	80065 WITHIN 5DAYS OF 9-30-96. IF DEF FAILS TO PAY, PL BY DECL MAY LIFT STAY & EVICT FROM PREMISES.
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON SEP-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
GENERAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS AND WAIVER OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1542 FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
